description: The Quality Street Gang operated in Manchester, England, in the 1960s, 1970s and 1980s. Some senior police officers considered them instigators of major crime, but others maintain they were merely a social friendship group. No member was ever arrested or convicted, leading to doubts about their criminal nature. The group was named after a TV advertisement for Quality Street confectionery.

country_links.evidence_quote: carried out armed robberies together in Holland.
country_links.context: Members of the Quality Street Gang carried out armed robberies together with the Inter City Jibbers in Holland.
